briefdescription.para: Initialize the VFS registry. Clears all mounts and descriptors.
Mount a filesystem at a path prefix.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if table is full or prefix exists.

briefdescription.para: Find the mount point for a given path.

simplesect.para: File descriptor (>= 0) on success, or negative error code.
0 on success, or negative error code.
Bytes read on success, or negative error code.
Bytes written on success, or negative error code.
New absolute offset on success, or negative error code.

briefdescription.para: Get current position in an open file.

simplesect.para: Current offset, or negative error code.
0 on success, or negative error code.
0 on success, or negative error code.
Directory descriptor (>= 0) on success, or negative error code.
1 if an entry was read, 0 at end-of-directory, or negative error.
0 on success, or negative error code.
